title: Mortgage Inequality Explorer
description: Interactive Streamlit dashboard analyzing mortgage approval disparities across 50+ U.S. states. Built on 100,000+ HMDA and Census records with geospatial choropleth visualizations revealing structural inequality patterns.

title: NBA All-Star Selection Prediction
description: Logistic regression model (L2 regularization) trained on 15,000 NBA player-seasons to predict All-Star selections. Validated through cross-validation and ROC analysis with strong discriminative performance.

title: Sports Betting Behavior Analysis
description: Analyzed real-time odds movement across hundreds of EPL and NFL games using EDA, regression modeling, and A/B-style comparisons to evaluate risk patterns and payout variability.

title: LoL Match Prediction
description: Logistic regression and gradient boosting on professional match data. Achieved >95% accuracy and conducted a fairness audit analyzing blue-side advantage bias across thousands of games.

title: Bikewatching
description: Interactive D3.js visualization tracking bike traffic patterns and urban mobility infrastructure across city stations. Highlights commuter flow trends and peak usage by time of day.

title: Persuasive or Deceptive Visualization
description: Paired visualizations of the same dataset demonstrating how design choices — axis scaling, color, framing — can mislead or persuade. A case study in data ethics and communication.

title: Medical Bill Decoder
description: iOS app using NLP to translate confusing medical bills into plain English and generate cost estimates with visual breakdowns of individual charges.
